message:
deps: bump ftui 0.2.1 -> 0.3.1

Minor bump within 0.x (0.2 -> 0.3). All 10 ftui-* subcrates bumped in
lockstep: ftui-backend, ftui-core, ftui-extras, ftui-i18n, ftui-layout,
ftui-render, ftui-runtime, ftui-style, ftui-text, ftui-widgets.

The single consumer (crates/ffs-tui/src/lib.rs) uses the stable
re-exported surface: `ftui::{Cmd, Event, KeyCode, Model, PackedRgba,
Style, KeyEvent, KeyEventKind, Modifiers, StyleFlags, GraphemePool}` and
the `ftui::layout`, `ftui::render::frame`, `ftui::text`,
`ftui::widgets::{block, paragraph, Widget}` paths. All of these still
resolve and compile under 0.3.1.

Verification:
  - rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets: clean
  - rch exec -- cargo test -p ffs-tui --lib: 56 passed / 0 failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
